title: Palworld

notes:
Used to work when it first released, but when I picked it up to play again after the recent updates, it no longer works. It installs and launches, but I only get a black screen with no sound (or anything at all), and it closes automatically after around 30 seconds. 

Tried with Proton GE9-10, Proton GE8-25, Proton Experimental and Proton cachyos, and also tried running it under gamescope, none of which had any different outcome (aside from gamescope, which I get the same black screen, but it doesn't automatically close)

I'm running it under Wayland (hyprland), but the same also happens on X11 (i3) for me
title: Palworld
